title: Protoplast Isolation - Enzyme Buffer
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"bhsm7","text":"Enzyme solution for the isolation of protoplasts suitable for Arabidopsis thaliana and Nicotiana benthamiana. Adapted from Yoo et al. 2007 http://www.nature.com/nprot/journal/v2/n7/full/nprot.2007.199.html","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":62,"length":20},{"style":"italic","offset":87,"length":21}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"edenu","text":"And excellent video from the Sheen Lab is available: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5-xm1EoLrW4","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6eqa","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: 500mM MES, pH 5.6 undetermined Final concentration is 1.5% (w/v) Final concentration is 10mM. Yoo et al. 2007 mention that MES is preheated to 70 o C for 3-5 minutes prior to addition of the enzyme powder.
Mannitol undetermined Final Concentration is 0.3% (w/v) Final concentration is 1.5% (w/v) Final concentration is 0.6M

1M Potassium Chloride KCl undetermined Final Concentration is 0.3% (w/v) Final concentration is 1.5% (w/v) Final concentration is 20μM Final concentration is 0.6M Final concentration is 10mM. Yoo et al. 2007 mention that MES is preheated to 70 o C for 3-5 minutes prior to addition of the enzyme powder.

Add dH 2 O up to 50mL Final Concentration is 0.3% (w/v) Final concentration is 1.5% (w/v) Final concentration is 20μM Final concentration is 0.6M Final concentration is 10mM. Yoo et al. 2007 mention that MES is preheated to 70 o C for 3-5 minutes prior to addition of the enzyme powder.
Cellulase R10 Final Concentration is 0.3% (w/v) Final concentration is 1.5% (w/v) Final concentration is 20μM
Heat the enzyme solution at 55 o C for 10 min, then allow to cool to room temperature.
Filter final solution through a 0.45-μm syringe filter.
creator: Steven J Burgess
